overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator showing a Mercedes truck cabin navigating a snowy highway at night. The truck drives through heavy snowfall, passing road signs for Vyborg and overtaking other vehicles including a red sedan and a FedEx truck.

events.description: road sign for Vyborg appears on right side of highway
truck enters curved section of snowy highway

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snowy highway, navigating gentle curves with headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: Mercedes truck dashboard with illuminated gauges, GPS navigation screen, and control buttons
black steering wheel with silver Mercedes logo in center
decorative white lace curtains hanging above the windshield
metal guardrails along the left side of the snowy road
blue rectangular road sign with white text reading ВЫБОРГ VYBORG
high piles of accumulated snow along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the driver's perspective inside a Mercedes truck cabin, showing the illuminated dashboard and decorative curtains. The truck drives along a snow-covered highway at night, passing a blue road sign indicating Vyborg. Metal guardrails line the left side of the road while snow banks accumulate on the right, with the truck navigating gentle curves through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved snowy highway approaching slower traffic

events.description: truck navigates through series of S-curves on the highway
red car appears ahead in the distance with brake lights visible

agents.ego_description: navigating curves on snowy highway, reducing speed while approaching slower vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in same lane, moving slower than the truck

entered.detail: red sedan with illuminated taillights driving ahead on the snowy road

segments.scene_description: The truck continues through a series of curves on the snow-covered highway, with the guardrails now closer to the left side. A red sedan appears in the distance ahead, driving slower than the truck. The Vyborg road sign disappears behind as the truck progresses, and the truck begins to close the distance to the vehicle ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with commercial vehicles and concrete overpass

events.description: truck overtakes red car on the left side
FedEx truck visible on right shoulder of the highway
truck passes under concrete overpass bridge

agents.ego_description: overtaking the red sedan and continuing past a commercial truck parked on the shoulder

notable_agents.action: red car being overtaken, moving to the right side of the truck
FedEx delivery truck stationary or moving slowly on the right shoulder

entered.detail: white delivery truck with purple and orange FedEx logo on the side
concrete highway overpass with support pillars passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The truck overtakes the red sedan, which moves to the right side and falls behind. A FedEx delivery truck appears on the right shoulder of the highway. The truck then passes under a concrete overpass bridge, with the structure momentarily filling the windshield view before opening back up to the snowy highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy highway continuing into distance

events.description: truck continues on straight section with gentle curves
heavy snowfall continues with slight reduction in visibility

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on open highway section with no immediate traffic, maintaining speed through falling snow

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along the open highway with the FedEx truck and overpass now behind. The guardrails recede into the distance on the left while snow banks continue to line the right side. The road stretches ahead into the darkness with heavy snowfall continuing, and no other vehicles are visible in the immediate vicinity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway at night, moving from a guided path of road signs to an open, desolate stretch of road. It begins with the illuminated dashboard and decorative curtains visible as the truck passes a blue road sign for Vyborg, gliding through gentle curves between metal guardrails and accumulating snow banks. As the truck progresses, the road sign recedes and the camera closes the distance toward a slow-moving red sedan. The scene then shifts as the truck overtakes the sedan and passes a FedEx delivery vehicle on the shoulder, momentarily moving under the shadow of a concrete overpass bridge. Finally, the view opens back up to the dark, snowy highway as the bridge and other vehicles vanish behind, leaving the road to stretch forward into the heavy snowfall.
